text: my uncle started a political rant before we even carved the turkey. longest thanksgiving ever
mom got me socks for christmas again. im 34
told everyone my new years resolution was to quit drinking. lasted 11 hours
my birthday cake said happy birthday brian. my name is brandon
wedding dj played the chicken dance 4 times. four. times.
baby shower games are just socially acceptable torture
went as sexy shrek for halloween. nobody laughed they just looked concerned
valentines dinner reservation got lost. ate mcdonalds in the car crying
forgot mothers day again. the guilt text from mom was 6 paragraphs
grandma asked my gf when shes getting pregnant. we been dating 3 weeks
my aunt brings the same dry casserole every thanskgiving and nobody eats it
secret santa budget was $20. got a used candle
new years resolution to go to the gym. bought the membership tho so thats something
turned 30 and nobody showed up to my party except my roommate
maid of honor speech was just her roasting the groom for 8 minutes straight
the diaper cake at the baby shower looked like it was held together with prayers
wore the same costume as 3 other people at the party. we were all joker
bf got me a blender for valentines. we r no longer together
my mom hinted she wanted grandkids during mothers day brunch. im 22
thanksgiving seating chart put me next to my ex. thanks mom real cool
opened christmas gift in front of everyone. it was a self help book about weight loss
new years kiss was with nobody bc i was in the bathroom at midnight
they forgot the candles on my birthday cake so everyone just stared at it
open bar wedding but it was only beer and wine. false advertising tbh
someone brought their kid to the baby shower and he broke a lamp
halloween candy budget was $50 and like 8 kids showed up
valentines day card from my partner was clearly bought at the gas station that morning
mothers day flower delivery went to the wrong house. neighbor got free roses
dad fell asleep during thanksgiving grace and knocked over the gravy boat
christmas morning my kid cried bc he wanted the box not the toy
my resolution was no screen time after 9pm lmaooo that lasted a day
surprise bday party except i walked in on them still setting up. 20 min early
best man was drunk before the ceremony even started
baby shower bingo is not a real game. its a cry for help
my sexy nurse costume ripped within the first hour of the party
sent my valentine a love poem i found on google. she googled it too
took mom to brunch for mothers day. bill was $187 for eggs and toast
cousin brought her new bf to thanksgiving. he tried to carve the turkey with a spoon
got regifted my own present from last christmas. recognized the wrapping
new years resolution to save money. bought a $300 planner to track it
nobody sang happy birthday they just clapped awkwardly
flower girl at the wedding threw petals directly at peoples faces
they served punch at the baby shower that tasted like cough syrup
carved a pumpkin that was supposed to be scary but everyone said it looked sad
valentines dinner i choked on bread and my date had to heimlich me
mothers day brunch my sister announced her pregnancy and stole the whole day
thanksgiving turkey was still frozen in the middle. we ate sides and shame
christmas tree fell over at 3am. ornament shrapnel everywhere
told myself id journal every day this year. theres one entry and its from jan 2
my 40th birthday party had a bouncy castle. nobody went in it
wedding food was buffet style and uncle gary went back 6 times
the baby shower theme was 'little peanut' and everything smelled like peanuts
wore a morphsuit to halloween party. couldnt eat or drink all night
roses on valentines cost me $90. they died in two days
forgot to make a mothers day card. drew one in the parking lot of the restaurant
sister in law brought store bought pie and said she made it. we all saw the sticker
xmas lights took 4 hours to put up and one strand doesnt work
resolution was to read more books. does reddit count
bday dinner at a nice place and my card got declined in front of everyone
the wedding vows were 20 minutes long each. my back gave out
someone guessed the babys weight wrong by like 4 pounds lol
went as a 'cereal killer' for halloween. nobody got it. everyone avoided me
my valentine mixed up the reservation dates. showed up a day late
got my mom a spa day for mothers day. she regifted it to my aunt
family argument at thanksgiving about whether stuffing goes inside the turkey
kid opened all the presents while we were sleeping on xmas eve
new years resolution to eat healthy. ordered pizza jan 1 at noon
my birthday candles set off the smoke alarm at the restaurant
mother of the bride wore white to the wedding. the audacity
baby shower guessing game about diaper contents. i will never recover
my halloween makeup melted off within an hour bc i was sweating
bought chocolates for vday. ate them myself on feb 13. no regrets actually
mothers day was spent assembling ikea furniture she ordered herself as a gift
thanksgiving gravy had lumps you could identify individually
wrapped an empty box as a joke gift. it was the only gift they got
said id learn a new language in 2025. learned how to say beer in spanish
friend threw me a surprise party at a place i told them i hated
wedding photographer got drunk and half the pics are blurry
co-ed baby shower with lawn games but it rained so we just sat there
my zombie costume scared a kid so bad his mom yelled at me
asked my crush to be my valentine. she said she thought i was joking
called mom on mothers day and she didnt pick up. texted 'whos this'
my brother deep fried the turkey and almost burned down the garage
christmas gift exchange limit was $25 and someone brought a $200 gift. ruined it
new years confetti got in my drink and i swallowed some. festive i guess
birthday bumps at 30 hit different. literally my back hurts
ring bearer dropped the rings into a vent at the church
they played 'guess the baby food flavor' at the shower. i tasted 3 and quit
hot glue burned thru my costume 10 min before the contest
valentines concert tickets were for the wrong date. classic us
moms face when she opened the vacuum cleaner on mothers day. never again
in-laws showed up 2 hours early for thanksgiving. turkey was still raw
cat knocked the christmas tree over twice. we zip tied it to the wall
resolution to quit coffee lasted until i had to go to work on jan 2
no one remembered my half birthday which is fair but still hurts
dj at the wedding played despacito 3 times and cotton eye joe twice
baby shower gift was a breast pump and the card said 'have fun lol'
wore platform boots with my costume and fell down the stairs immediately
valentines day dinner i accidentally called the waiter babe
forgetting mothers day is genetic apparently. dad forgot too
